examples: At the time, Arnold had disapproved of such levity.
When he finished with a final birdie, any seriousness of the incident gave way to levity.
I am sure foreigners must think our levity is baffling.
Surely this ordeal has been traumatizing for Te'o, but some levity may have helped.
The levity in the sitcom made it easier for many viewers -- and me -- to swallow.
